module.title: SAP TM Organizational Structure & Master Data

topic.title: SAP TM Organizational Model - End-to-End Business Process

learningObjectives.title: Understand end-to-end organizational flow
learningObjectives.description: Explain how organizational units participate from demand creation to freight settlement.

learningObjectives.title: Understand automatic organizational determination
learningObjectives.description: Identify how planning organization, group and planner are assigned automatically.

learningObjectives.title: Differentiate organizational and enterprise structures
learningObjectives.description: Clarify responsibility model versus business entity model in SAP TM.

sections.title: End-to-End Organizational Process in SAP TM

sections.content: The SAP TM Organizational Model is involved throughout the transportation lifecycle. From the creation of transportation demand to freight settlement, organizational units determine who plans, executes, monitors and settles transportation activities.

sections.title: Key Concept
sections.content: The Organizational Model ensures that every transportation activity is assigned to the correct planner, execution team and settlement organization.

A retail company receives an outbound delivery from its Hyderabad plant. Based on the shipping location and transportation zone, SAP TM automatically assigns the South Planning Organization. A planner optimizes Freight Units into Freight Orders, assigns a carrier and monitors execution until freight settlement.

sections.title: Real Project Example
sections.content: A multinational FMCG company configured separate Planning Organizations for Domestic and Export logistics. Freight Units were automatically assigned based on transportation zones, reducing manual planner allocation and improving planning efficiency.

sections.title: Interview Tip
sections.content: Explain the complete flow: Business Document -> Freight Unit -> Planning Organization -> Planner -> Freight Order -> Carrier -> Settlement. This is a favorite certification and interview question.

sections.title: Common Mistake
sections.content: Do not confuse organizational assignment with resource assignment. Organizational assignment determines the responsible planner, while resource assignment allocates trucks, trailers and drivers.

items: The Organizational Model supports the complete transportation lifecycle.
